gaps: Snapshot lacks docket entries, docket number, cert-stage dates, lower-court metadata, question presented, and petition text.
Semantic search over petition text or cluster summaries would help when structured filters are unavailable.
helpful: Schema files made the artifact contract clear.
fedcourts paths confirmed the event location.
fedcourts stats provided SCOTUS base-rate calibration.
fedcourts query exposed the limits of structured priors for sparse snapshots.
notes: The base-rate tool was useful, but this case had too little structured metadata for targeted priors beyond court-level SCOTUS context.
